title: canarium asperum
intro: Canarium asperum, also known as the Malabar Tamarind, is a flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is native to Western Ghats of India and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as to aid in digestion and relieve nausea. The medicinal properties of Canarium asperum are attributed to its rich content of antioxidants and flavonoids, which provide various health benefits such as reducing stress, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative damage. Canarium asperum is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
